description: Add cross-session handoff doc format to RPI workflow (merged #8/#2). Define lightweight handoff format (timestamp, accomplishments, unfinished work, open questions, file paths) as an optional step between 'verify and loop' and session end.
Add retrospective appendix to pr-prep workflow (#9). Append 3-4 structured reflection questions (plan accuracy, skipped steps, time vs. estimate, what to change) to the end of pr-prep.md.

Create lightweight decision log (#15). Add docs/decisions/log.md with table format and clear scope boundary (one-line decisions that don't warrant a full DD record). Add a cross-reference from the DD workflow.

Build self-evaluation skill (#3). Write a skill that reads docs/evaluation-rubric.md at runtime and applies automatable dimensions (testability, trigger clarity, overlap, coverage) to a target skill/workflow, flagging human-judgment dimensions for manual review. Validate by running on 2-3 existing skills.

Add research doc freshness tracking (#14). Define a 'last verified' field for research and onboarding doc templates, and document a staleness heuristic (git log --since on relevant file paths). Requires spike-level design of the heuristic before implementation.
